domain: Bali off-plan property for foreign investors
audience: English-speaking foreign investors, primarily US-based and Dubai / UAE-based, evaluating Bali off-plan property as an investment or second home. Front-load the public answer to the exact question they would search, and compare Bali to alternatives they know (US markets, Dubai) where it helps.
notes: ATP = Answer The Public question wheel (who/what/when/where/why/how/can/are + for/with/near/vs). Lower priority number is published first. Status: pending | drafting | review | published | blocked. Investor-facing topics should set isInsight=true on the article. Foreign-ownership and tax topics are top of funnel for this audience, so they lead.
